title: AI Image AI

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Mystical tree-of-life landscape. Central Tree: ancient towering tree with dark-green canopy and massive twisted roots, with roots curling around wet rocks like natural bridges integrated into the earth and water. Orb: golden orb containing a delicate glowing tree-of-life silhouette, cradled inside the canopy and casting warm ethereal light. Water System: rushing stream tumbling over mossy stones into a small pool, connecting foreground motion to background depth. Background: colossal waterfall dropping from a mist-wrapped cliff, mist, cliffs, and atmospheric scale. Palette and Light: deep emerald greens, charcoal sky, warm gold orb, and cool mist whites; warm orb glow against moody overcast landscape creates the main visual drama. Style: Cinematic fantasy realism, detailed foliage, moss, water, bark, and mist texture. Restrictions: No generic wallpaper blur, no random extra symbols, no muddy monotone, no cartoon style, no clutter.
